start_manual.name: Start manual irrigation
start_manual.description: Start one zone with exactly one duration or volume target.

hard_time_limit.name: Hard time limit
hard_time_limit.description: Required safety timeout in seconds for a volume target.

expiry.name: Expiry
expiry.description: Maximum time in seconds before an uncompleted request expires.

create_manual.name: Create manual irrigation request
create_manual.description: Persist and queue one manual irrigation request.

start_manual_from_card.name: Start manual irrigation from a card
start_manual_from_card.description: Create one manual irrigation order and atomically resolve an active irrigation execution using the selected policy.

list_card_orders.name: List open irrigation orders for cards
list_card_orders.description: Return only open irrigation orders with queue-adjusted expected starts.

list_zone_history.name: List zone history for cards
list_zone_history.description: Return a filtered, paginated irrigation execution history for exactly one irrigation zone.

create_manual_plan.name: Create manual multi-zone plan
create_manual_plan.description: Atomically create an ordered set of future or immediate zone requests.

edit_request.name: Edit irrigation request
edit_request.description: Edit target, desired start, or expiry before execution.

reorder_requests.name: Reorder irrigation requests
reorder_requests.description: Set an explicit stable order for unstarted manual requests.

stop_and_skip.name: Stop and skip once
stop_and_skip.description: Stop the selected execution and suppress its current automatic opportunity.

pause_request.name: Pause irrigation request
pause_request.description: Pause one selected request and preserve its remaining target.

plan_automatic.name: Plan automatic irrigation
plan_automatic.description: Deterministically plan the current watering opportunities, optionally without creating requests.

finalize_daily_weather.name: Finalize daily weather
finalize_daily_weather.description: Apply one finalized ET0 and rain period to every zone exactly once.

skip_automatic.name: Skip automatic watering once
skip_automatic.description: Suppress the current watering opportunity for one zone, including across restarts.

clear_forecast_deferral.name: Cancel forecast deferral
clear_forecast_deferral.description: Cancel the persisted rain-forecast delay for one irrigation zone.

export_config.name: Export portable configuration
export_config.description: Return the versioned installation and zone configuration without secrets.

import_config.name: Import portable configuration
import_config.description: Preview or explicitly overwrite this installation using a versioned export and explicit entity mappings.

correct_physical_meter.name: Correct physical meter
correct_physical_meter.description: Set the observed physical meter total without rewriting historical consumption.

export_history.name: Export irrigation history
export_history.description: Return a bounded set of the newest irrigation executions as JSON or CSV.

resolve_balance_reconciliation.name: Resolve balance reconciliation
resolve_balance_reconciliation.description: Apply current zone settings to an uncredited delivery or explicitly discard it.

set_winter_lock.name: Set winter lock
set_winter_lock.description: Confirm that the installation is drained, stop all irrigation, close all valves, and persist the winter lock.

clear_winter_lock.name: Clear winter lock
clear_winter_lock.description: Consciously release the winter lock after a closed-state preflight.

start_maintenance_test.name: Start supervised maintenance test
start_maintenance_test.description: Run exactly one time-bounded zone test with mandatory dead-man confirmation.

bypass_checks.name: Bypassed checks
bypass_checks.description: Only selected implemented sensor checks are bypassed. Valve feedback and exclusivity remain mandatory.

water_attribution.name: Water attribution
water_attribution.description: Attribute measured water to the selected zone or to unassigned consumption.

confirm_maintenance_test.name: Confirm maintenance supervision
confirm_maintenance_test.description: Refresh the dead-man deadline without extending the fixed test timeout.

stop_maintenance_test.name: Stop maintenance test
stop_maintenance_test.description: Stop the active supervised test and close all valves.

start_calibration.name: Start flow calibration
start_calibration.description: Run a supervised measured zone test and create a review-only flow proposal.

get_calibration_proposal.name: Get calibration proposal
get_calibration_proposal.description: Return the latest measured proposal without applying it.

resolve_calibration.name: Resolve calibration proposal
resolve_calibration.description: Explicitly accept or discard a pending calibration proposal.

list_profiles.name: List irrigation profiles
list_profiles.description: Return versioned immutable built-ins and user-owned profile copies.

preview_profile_impact.name: Preview profile impact
preview_profile_impact.description: Return every irrigation zone affected by a profile change.

copy_profile.name: Copy irrigation profile
copy_profile.description: Create an editable user-owned copy without modifying its built-in source.

archive_zone.name: Archive irrigation zone
archive_zone.description: Archive an idle zone while retaining its device identity, history, statistics, and accounting.

restore_zone.name: Restore irrigation zone
restore_zone.description: Restore an archived zone at safe idle.

suspend_automatic.name: Suspend automatic irrigation
suspend_automatic.description: Suspend automatic irrigation globally or for one zone until a timestamp.

resume_automatic.name: Resume automatic irrigation
resume_automatic.description: Clear a global or zone automatic suspension immediately.

list_maintenance.name: List irrigation maintenance
list_maintenance.description: Return recurring tasks, due dates, history, and spring recommission status.

complete_maintenance_task.name: Complete maintenance task
complete_maintenance_task.description: Complete a recurring task and calculate its next due date.

snooze_maintenance_task.name: Snooze maintenance task
snooze_maintenance_task.description: Delay one task while retaining its original due date and history.

update_spring_checklist.name: Update spring checklist
update_spring_checklist.description: Confirm or reopen one configured recommission checklist item.

set_installation_operation.name: Set installation operation release
set_installation_operation.description: Enable or disable all manual and automatic irrigation.

set_installation_automation.name: Set installation automatic release
set_installation_automation.description: Enable or disable automatic irrigation without changing manual operation.

set_zone_operation.name: Set zone operation release
set_zone_operation.description: Enable or disable all irrigation for one zone.

set_zone_automation.name: Set zone automatic release
set_zone_automation.description: Enable or disable automatic irrigation for one zone.

reset_safety_lock.name: Reset safety lock
reset_safety_lock.description: Reset the canonical installation safety lock after inspection.

options.sandy_loam: Loose soil that holds some water

options.established: Established for more than one season

options.slow: Water remains for a long time

options.vegetables: Mixed vegetables, e.g. lettuce, tomatoes, beans

options.rain_shadow: Under a roof/eave or strong rain shadow

options.fail_safe: Fail safe (block on unavailable or stale input)

expert_create.title: Create irrigation installation
expert_create.description: Configure the shared water supply. Irrigation zones are added afterwards.

data.name: Name
data.solar_radiation_sensors: Solar radiation sensors in priority order
data.sunshine_duration_sensors: Sunshine duration sensors in priority order
data.et0_sensors: Direct ET0 sensors in priority order

data_description.main_valve: Optional switch or valve that isolates the complete installation.
data_description.water_meter: Optional cumulative water sensor. Without it only time control is available.
data_description.flow_sensor: Optional rate sensor for faster flow safety checks and idle leak monitoring.
data_description.leak_monitoring: Enabled by default when a flow sensor is configured.
data_description.leak_flow_threshold: Continuous idle flow above this rate is hazardous.
data_description.leak_duration_seconds: Shorter flow artifacts and post-watering runoff are ignored.
data_description.weather_entity: Optional source for weather measurements and forecasts.
data_description.local_wind_height_m: Defaults to 2 m. Set the physical measurement height of the configured local wind sensors; only other heights are normalized to 2 m.
data_description.weather_wind_height_m: Defaults to 10 m because weather providers commonly report standardized 10 m wind. Change it when the provider documents another height.
data_description.weather_backfill_days: Safety and retention cap for missing daily periods processed after downtime. Older periods are outside retained automatic backfill.

installation_hardware.title: Optional main valve
installation_hardware.description: Leave this empty when the installation has no shared main valve.

installation_meter.title: Optional water measurement
installation_meter.description: Select no measurement, a cumulative volume meter, or a pulse meter. Pulse factors are stored canonically as liters per pulse.

installation_schedule.title: Weekly schedule
installation_schedule.description: Each weekday is either completely empty or has start, end, and one full target.

installation_safety.title: Safety limits
installation_safety.description: Software and wireless valves can fail. Use a physical hardware shutoff timer or equivalent independent limit so water stops even if Home Assistant does not.

data.hardware_shutoff_acknowledged: I understand and have considered an independent hardware shutoff

import.title: Import a new irrigation installation
import.description: Validate a portable export and explicit entity remapping before creating a separate installation.

import_confirm.title: Confirm new installation
import_confirm.description: Create a new installation and all zone subentries with fresh identities. Preview: {preview}

import_profile_confirmation.title: Confirm imported researched profiles
import_profile_confirmation.description: Review the researched profile sources, assumptions, TAW, and RAW locally. Imported confirmation flags are ignored. Preview: {preview}

data.confirm_researched_profiles: I reviewed and accept these profile assumptions

abort.already_configured: This irrigation installation is already configured.
abort.actuator_already_owned: An existing irrigation installation already owns one of the imported actuators or feedback entities.
abort.import_not_pending: There is no validated import awaiting confirmation.

error.invalid_weather_curve: Enter twelve comma-separated monthly values and a valid finalization time.
error.invalid_profiles: Profile data or a profile reference is invalid.
error.multiple_meter_sources: Select either a cumulative volume meter or a raw count meter, not both.
error.raw_meter_requires_factor: A raw meter and its liters-per-count factor must be configured together.
error.main_feedback_requires_main_valve: Main-valve feedback requires a configured main valve.
error.selected_meter_required: Select the sensor matching the chosen meter type.
error.local_weather_source_required: Select a local weather entity or direct reference-evapotranspiration sensor.
error.hardware_shutoff_acknowledgement_require: Automatic operation cannot be enabled until the independent hardware-shutoff warning is acknowledged.

installation_automation_disable.title: Disable automatic irrigation
installation_automation_disable.description: An automatic irrigation execution is active. Choose whether to stop it now or let it finish.

reset_safety.title: Clear safety lock
reset_safety.description: Warning: clear the lock only after inspecting the installation and confirming that every valve is safely closed.

data.confirm_reset: The installation was inspected and is safe to release

guided_installation.title: Installation essentials
guided_installation.description: Only common choices are shown. Hidden expert values are preserved. Imported and migrated installations remain automatically disabled until the hardware warning is acknowledged locally.

guided_zone_settings.title: Guided zone settings
guided_zone_settings.description: Profile changes show their expected water and runtime impact before saving. Hidden expert values are preserved.

installation.title: Installation expert settings
installation.description: Changes are saved immediately and applied after all open irrigation requests are finished.

data.name: Name
data.solar_radiation_sensors: Solar radiation sensors in priority order
data.sunshine_duration_sensors: Sunshine duration sensors in priority order
data.et0_sensors: Direct ET0 sensors in priority order

data_description.local_wind_height_m: Defaults to 2 m for local garden sensors; set their actual physical height.
data_description.weather_wind_height_m: Defaults to the standard weather-provider height of 10 m; override when documented otherwise.
data_description.weather_backfill_days: Maximum number of historical local days retained for automatic restart backfill.

import_config.title: Preview configuration import
import_config.description: Provide only an Irrigation Manager portable export and explicit mappings.

import_profile_confirmation.title: Confirm imported researched profiles
import_profile_confirmation.description: Review the researched profile zones and resolved TAW/RAW locally. Imported confirmation flags are ignored. Preview: {preview}

data.confirm_researched_profiles: I reviewed and accept these profile assumptions

data.confirm_overwrite: Overwrite the mapped installation and zones

profile_impact.title: Confirm profile changes
profile_impact.description: Affected irrigation zones: {zones}. Historical calculations remain unchanged.

zone_settings.title: Zone expert settings
zone_settings.description: Changes are saved immediately and applied after all open irrigation requests are finished.

data.name: Name
data.agronomic_values_confirmed: I reviewed and confirm the agronomic values

zone_profile_confirmation.title: Confirm researched profile selection
zone_profile_confirmation.description: Review profile ranges, confidence, sources, assumptions, warnings, and the resolved TAW and RAW before saving: {preview}

abort.no_zones: Add an irrigation zone before editing zone settings.
abort.zone_not_found: The selected irrigation zone no longer exists.
abort.already_configured: This zone valve is already configured.
abort.profile_change_not_pending: There is no pending profile change to confirm.
abort.configuration_changed: The installation changed while this form was open. Reopen it and apply your changes again.
abort.installation_not_loaded: The irrigation installation is not loaded.
abort.import_not_pending: There is no previewed import to confirm.
abort.profile_selection_not_pending: There is no researched profile selection awaiting confirmation.
abort.profile_selection_cancelled: The researched profile selection was not saved.

error.invalid_weather_curve: Enter twelve comma-separated monthly values and a valid finalization time.
error.invalid_profiles: Profile data or a profile reference is invalid.
error.multiple_meter_sources: Select either a cumulative volume meter or a raw count meter, not both.
error.raw_meter_requires_factor: A raw meter and its liters-per-count factor must be configured together.
error.main_feedback_requires_main_valve: Main-valve feedback requires a configured main valve.
error.soil_moisture_correction_limit_required: A conservative correction role requires an explicit positive correction limit.
error.wind_interlock_requires_source_and_thres: Wind source and threshold must be configured together.
error.invalid_import: The portable file, version, entity mappings, or zone mappings are invalid.
error.invalid_maintenance_configuration: Use a valid MM-DD reminder date, unique task/checklist IDs, ISO due dates, and positive recurrence intervals.
error.selected_meter_required: Select the sensor matching the chosen meter type.
error.meter_required_by_volume_zones: Convert all volume-controlled zones to time control before removing the water meter.
error.reset_confirmation_required: Inspect the installation and explicitly confirm the safety reset.

expert.title: Add irrigation zone
expert.description: Choose a guided setup for plain-language recommendations or expert settings for the complete stored model.

data.name: Name
data.agronomic_values_confirmed: I reviewed and confirm the agronomic values

data_description.meter_failure_strategy: Applies only when a configured cumulative meter fails. Estimated fallback continues by time using the zone flow profile. Without a cumulative meter, automatic targets run by estimated duration.
data_description.watering_windows: Rules use HH:MM-HH:MM, mon,tue@HH:MM-HH:MM, YYYY-MM-DD@closed, or mon@sunrise-00:30..sunset+01:00. Date rules override weekdays; weekday rules override defaults.
data_description.phenology_stage_schedule: For staged profiles, provide season_start as MM-DD plus initial_days, development_days, mid_days, and late_days, or explicit recurring stage boundary dates. No hemisphere is assumed.

user.title: Add irrigation zone
user.description: Choose guided setup for plain-language recommendations or expert settings for the complete stored model.

zone_basic.title: Zone and valve
zone_basic.description: One zone is everything switched by this one valve.

zone_area.title: Watered area
zone_area.description: Area directly determines expected liters. An unknown area uses a clearly marked 1 m² placeholder and blocks safe automation readiness.

zone_raised_bed.title: Raised-bed soil
zone_raised_bed.description: Usable soil depth limits water storage; do not include drainage layers or empty space. Age, organic matter, and drainage help explain uncertainty.

data.organic_rich: Is the mix rich in compost/organic matter?

zone_profiles.title: Plants and location
zone_profiles.description: Choose recognizable categories. The next review explains why these researched planning defaults were selected and shows their ranges and assumptions.

zone_rate.title: Application rate
zone_rate.description: Measured flow enables calibrated automatic operation. An application-rate estimate is useful for a preview but does not count as calibration.

data.rate_source: How is the application rate known?

zone_automatic.title: Automatic watering
zone_automatic.description: Demand mode waters only when enough water is missing. Minimum mode guarantees a minimum dose at every due opportunity.

zone_cycle_soak.title: Cycle and soak
zone_cycle_soak.description: Recommendation reason: {recommendation}. Short doses with soak pauses reduce runoff when water arrives faster than soil can accept it.

zone_safety.title: Zone safety limits
zone_safety.description: These limits cap every automatic target independently of the calculated need.

data.confirm_profile_selection: I reviewed the assumptions and want to save this zone

profile_confirmation.title: Confirm researched profile selection
profile_confirmation.description: Review profile ranges, confidence, sources, assumptions, warnings, and the resolved TAW and RAW before saving: {preview}

calibration.title: Calibrate flow
calibration.description: {zone} will receive real water for the selected duration. Stay on site, inspect pipes and emitters, and keep Stop or Emergency Stop available. Water is attributed to this zone; measured values are applied only after a separate review.

data.confirm_supervision: I am supervising this zone on site and it may open now

calibration_running.title: Calibration running
calibration_running.description: {zone} is being measured and will close automatically. Select Submit at least every {interval} seconds to renew safety supervision. Once the valve and post-run observation have finished, the next submission shows the result. {status}

calibration_review.title: Review calibration
calibration_review.description: {result} Apply the proposed normal range only when flow and installation behavior were plausible.

data.confirm_resolution: I reviewed the measurement and proposed values

data.name: Name
data.agronomic_values_confirmed: I reviewed and confirm the agronomic values

data_description.meter_failure_strategy: Applies only when a configured cumulative meter fails. Estimated fallback continues by time using the zone flow profile. Without a cumulative meter, automatic targets run by estimated duration.
data_description.watering_windows: Rules use HH:MM-HH:MM, mon,tue@HH:MM-HH:MM, YYYY-MM-DD@closed, or mon@sunrise-00:30..sunset+01:00. Date rules override weekdays; weekday rules override defaults.
data_description.phenology_stage_schedule: For staged profiles, provide season_start as MM-DD plus initial_days, development_days, mid_days, and late_days, or explicit recurring stage boundary dates. No hemisphere is assumed.

automation_disable.title: Disable automatic irrigation
automation_disable.description: An automatic irrigation execution is active in this zone. Choose whether to stop it now or let it finish.

abort.already_configured: This zone valve is already configured.
abort.profile_selection_not_pending: There is no researched profile selection awaiting confirmation.
abort.profile_selection_cancelled: The researched profile selection was not saved.
abort.installation_not_loaded: The irrigation installation is not currently loaded.
abort.calibration_configuration_invalid: The configured test and supervision deadlines do not permit a safe calibration.
abort.calibration_no_proposal: The measurement ended without a valid calibration proposal. Check locks, sensors, and events before trying again.
abort.calibration_accepted: The measured flow range was applied to this irrigation zone.
abort.calibration_discarded: The calibration proposal was discarded; the previous flow values remain unchanged.

error.invalid_intervals: The maximum interval must not be shorter than the minimum interval.
error.invalid_watering_windows: Enter at least one valid default, weekday, date, or sun-event watering-window rule.
error.automation_requires_flow_profile: Automatic release requires minimum and maximum flow values.
error.agronomic_confirmation_required: Review and confirm the generic or customized agronomic values before enabling automatic irrigation.
error.invalid_profiles: Profile data, Teilflaechen, or a profile reference is invalid.
error.soil_moisture_correction_limit_required: A conservative correction role requires an explicit positive correction limit.
error.wind_interlock_requires_source_and_thres: Wind source and threshold must be configured together.
error.measured_flow_required: Enter both ends of the measured flow range.
error.invalid_flow_range: Maximum flow must be greater than minimum flow.
error.calibration_supervision_required: Confirm on-site supervision before opening a valve.
error.calibration_start_failed: Calibration did not pass its safety preflight or the installation is busy.
error.calibration_resolution_required: Review the result and confirm your decision.
error.calibration_resolution_failed: The proposal could not be applied or discarded. The zone may have changed since measurement.
error.volume_max_runtime_required: Volume control requires a hard maximum runtime.
error.schedule_row_incomplete: Every configured weekday requires start, end, and target.
error.schedule_row_invalid: Enter a valid start and end time.
error.schedule_target_invalid: Enter a positive duration or volume target.
error.schedule_overlap: Adjacent weekday windows must not overlap, including across midnight.
error.schedule_target_does_not_fit: The complete target must fit inside its window.
